description: You are a Technical SEO specialist diagnosing indexation issues. Crawl https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider and perform a crawl analysis to identify canonical chains and loops. Export the 'Canonical Chains' report as a CSV file to '~/Documents/SEO/reports/canonical_chains_audit.csv'. Create a text file at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/chain_summary.txt' containing the total number of chains found in the report.
